full_text:
Huang Xiang (Xiuming)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Xiang, styledXiuming, was born in Guangling. Called the finest calligrapher of his age, combined the styles of Zhang Chao and Chen Liangpu. Huang Xiang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
